debug_info.goal:
pbar : Pose
ε : ℝ
poly : GoodPoly
pc : GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition poly pbar ε
P : Euc(3)
⊢ ‖P‖ * nth_partial 1 (GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer pbar ε poly P pc) pbar.outerParams =
    inner ℝ (pbar.rotM₂φ P) (GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.w poly pbar ε pc)

failed_attempts: sorry

rcases eq_or_ne ‖P‖ 0 with hP | hP
  · simp [hP, GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit, Pose.rotM₂φ_zero]
  · simp [nth_partial, GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit, hP]
    field_simp
    rw [Pose.fderiv_rotM₂_φ pbar P, real_inner_comm]

    simp
